message:
test(doctor): add policy activation e2e test and JSON fixtures

Add doctor_policy_activation_e2e.rs covering pass, warn, block, and
invalid-input scenarios for the doctor policy-activation sub-command,
along with four JSON fixture files that drive the test cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
